title: Pop up that says who is notified when a notify automation is triggered
excerpt: Similar to the pop up that shows on the screen when an automation moves an item to a different group, except it says who is notified due to the change made. I think this would be helpful to users so that they can get an …

posts.author: liamanderson (Liam Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Similar to the pop up that shows on the screen when an automation moves an item to a different group, except it says who is notified due to the change made. I think this would be helpful to users so that they can get an extra level of transparency and confirmation that what they are doing is visible to others who need to see it.
